tolerance.notes: PPM evaluator math is +/-/*/divide of cell-averaged libm values plus a small fixed parabola formula. The dominant noise is libm cos/sin used to derive the cell averages; the rule's own arithmetic is exact in Float64. 1e-13 covers libm differences across our supported platforms while flagging any genuine accuracy regression.

reference_binding_notes: First cross-binding rule-eval golden for PPM (dsc-rys). Python and Rust siblings consume this same fixture + golden and must agree to the tolerance above.

manufactured_solution.name: smooth_periodic
manufactured_solution.comment: Cell averages are integrated analytically per cell from the antiderivative so the only numerical noise is libm sin/cos.
